summary: Tested blueprint line grid + CRT scan-line overlays across all 8 homepage sections and AuditHistoryScreen chart/delta features. All implemented correctly per source code and live DOM verification.
critical_code_review_comments: TheStandardSection uses 48px grid spacing instead of 52px — minor inconsistency vs other sections (all others use 52px). Not a bug, but worth noting for visual consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All blueprint grid + CRT overlay features verified in code and live DOM. AuditHistoryScreen height=240 and delta badge logic confirmed in source. Portal audit history was verified via code review only (auth required for live test).

feature_verification.HeroSection blueprint grid (52px): PASS - DOM confirmed linear-gradient with 52px backgroundSize
feature_verification.ExposureBand blueprint + CRT: PASS - both overlays confirmed in DOM
feature_verification.NotForSection blueprint + CRT: PASS - both overlays confirmed in DOM
feature_verification.TheStandardSection blueprint (48px) + CR: PASS - grid in section bg, CRT overlay div present

feature_verification.FinalCTASection blueprint + CRT: PASS - both overlays confirmed in DOM
feature_verification.Delta badge logic: PASS - delta computed from history[idx+1], rendered with data-testid=delta-badge-{checkId}
